task_completion.description: Construct interior partition walls to create 5 distinct zones (Lobby, GM Control Room, Chamber 1, Chamber 2, Chamber 3).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan view of Sweet Home 3D, look for at least 5 interior partition walls dividing the building shell into 5 separate areas.

task_completion.description: Place doors connecting the Lobby to Chamber 1 and GM Control Room, and sequential doors between Chambers 1, 2, and 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 4 door models placed in the walls, specifically connecting the Lobby to Chamber 1, Lobby to GM Control Room, Chamber 1 to Chamber 2, and Chamber 2 to Chamber 3.

task_completion.description: Identify each zone with text labels or room definitions and apply distinct floor colors/textures to at least three rooms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels (Lobby, GM Control Room, Chamber 1, Chamber 2, Chamber 3) in the 2D plan. In the 3D view or 2D plan, verify that at least 3 rooms have distinct floor colors or textures.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Lobby and GM Control Room with at least 6 seating items and 2 desks or tables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 6 chairs/sofas and 2 desks/tables placed within the areas designated as the Lobby and GM Control Room.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Game Chambers with at least 8 storage/prop items and 4 light fixtures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 8 storage items (e.g., bookcases, shelves, chests) and 4 light fixtures placed within Chambers 1, 2, and 3.

task_completion.description: Include at least 40 total furniture items from the built-in catalog in the facility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the furniture list panel on the left side of the screen; it should be heavily populated (indicating >= 40 items), and the 2D/3D views should show a densely furnished facility.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D graphical interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application window being actively used, rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying the .sh3d file directly.

integrity.description: The agent progressively built the layout rather than loading a pre-made completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequential screenshots should show the gradual addition of walls, doors, room definitions, and furniture over time.

integrity.description: The agent saved the project when finished.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the agent clicking the Save button, using the File -> Save menu, or the window title should not have an asterisk (*) indicating unsaved changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying 'escape_room_starter.sh3d'. Required object counts: >= 5 walls to create 5 zones, >= 4 doors for specific connections, >= 3 rooms with distinct floor colors/textures, >= 6 seating items and >= 2 desks in admin areas, >= 8 storage/prop items and >= 4 light fixtures in game chambers, and >= 40 total furniture items. Pass threshold is 70/100 points.
